languages.text: "Я сам". {n}Из-под вокс-решетки показывается уголок изорванного рта Себериана, растянутого в улыбке.{/n} "Пять веков назад полк в полном составе принес мне присягу, а она, наследни{mf|к|ца}, не имеет обратной силы".

"I myself did." {n}From beneath the vox-grille, a corner of Seberian's torn mouth becomes visible as it stretches into a smile.{/n} "Five centuries ago, the regiment swore its oath of fealty to me in its entirety, and such an oath, my heir, cannot be undone."
languages.original_text: "Я сам". {n}Из-под вокс-решетки показывается уголок изорванного рта Себериана, растянутого в улыбке.{/n} "Пять веков назад полк в полном составе принес мне присягу, а она, наследни{mf|к|ца}, не имеет обратной силы".

"I myself did." {n}From beneath the vox-grille, a corner of Seberian's torn mouth becomes visible as it stretches into a smile.{/n} "Five centuries ago, the regiment swore its oath of fealty to me in its entirety, and such an oath, heir, cannot be undone."

"I myself did." {n}From beneath the vox-grille, a corner of Seberian's torn mouth becomes visible as it stretches into a smile.{/n} "Five centuries ago, the regiment swore its oath of fealty to me in its entirety, and such an oath, heir, cannot be undone."

"I myself did." {n}From beneath the vox-grille, a corner of Seberian's torn mouth becomes visible as it stretches into a smile.{/n} "Five centuries ago, the regiment swore its oath of fealty to me in its entirety, and such an oath, my heir, cannot be undone."

languages.text: «Yo mismo». {n}La comisura de los desfigurados labios de Seberian se estira en una sonrisa hasta asomar por una esquina de la rejilla de su voco.{/n} «El regimiento entero me juró lealtad hace cinco siglos, y un juramento como ese, {mf|heredero mío|heredera mía}, no puede quebrantarse».
languages.original_text: "I myself did." {n}From beneath the vox-grille, a corner of Seberian's torn mouth becomes visible as it stretches into a smile.{/n} "Five centuries ago, the regiment swore its oath of fealty to me in its entirety, and such an oath, my heir, cannot be undone."

traits.locale_text: «Yo mismo». {n}La comisura de los desfigurados labios de Seberian se estira en una sonrisa hasta asomar por una esquina de la rejilla de su voco.{/n} «El regimiento entero me juró lealtad hace cinco siglos, y un juramento como ese, {mf|heredero mío|heredera mía}, no puede quebrantarse».

languages.text: “是我。”{n}塞贝里安破损的嘴角从音阵格栅下露了出来，扯出一丝笑意。{/n}“五个世纪前，这支军团向我宣誓效忠。而这份誓言，我的继承人，可是无法撤销的。”
languages.original_text: "I myself did." {n}From beneath the vox-grille, a corner of Seberian's torn mouth becomes visible as it stretches into a smile.{/n} "Five centuries ago, the regiment swore its oath of fealty to me in its entirety, and such an oath, my heir, cannot be undone."

traits.locale_text: “是我。”{n}塞贝里安破损的嘴角从音阵格栅下露了出来，扯出一丝笑意。{/n}“五个世纪前，这支军团向我宣誓效忠。而这份誓言，我的继承人，可是无法撤销的。”

languages.text: « Moi. » {n}Sous la grille-vox, un coin de la bouche meurtrie de Seberian devient visible tandis que ses lèvres s'étirent en un sourire.{/n} « Il y a cinq cents ans de cela, le régiment tout entier m'a prêté serment de fidélité, et une telle promesse ne s'oublie jamais, {mf|héritier|héritière}. »
languages.original_text: "I myself did." {n}From beneath the vox-grille, a corner of Seberian's torn mouth becomes visible as it stretches into a smile.{/n} "Five centuries ago, the regiment swore its oath of fealty to me in its entirety, and such an oath, my heir, cannot be undone."

traits.locale_text: « Moi. » {n}Sous la grille-vox, un coin de la bouche meurtrie de Seberian devient visible tandis que ses lèvres s'étirent en un sourire.{/n} « Il y a cinq cents ans de cela, le régiment tout entier m'a prêté serment de fidélité, et une telle promesse ne s'oublie jamais, {mf|héritier|héritière}. »

languages.text: "Kendim verdim." {n}Voks ızgarasının altından Seberian'ın yırtık ağzının bir köşesi, gülümsermiş gibi beliriyor.{/n} "Beş yüzyıl önce alayın tamamı bana sadakat yemini etmişti. Böyle bir yemin vârisim, geri alınamaz."
languages.original_text: "I myself did." {n}From beneath the vox-grille, a corner of Seberian's torn mouth becomes visible as it stretches into a smile.{/n} "Five centuries ago, the regiment swore its oath of fealty to me in its entirety, and such an oath, my heir, cannot be undone."

traits.locale_text: "Kendim verdim." {n}Voks ızgarasının altından Seberian'ın yırtık ağzının bir köşesi, gülümsermiş gibi beliriyor.{/n} "Beş yüzyıl önce alayın tamamı bana sadakat yemini etmişti. Böyle bir yemin vârisim, geri alınamaz."

languages.text: 「私もそうでした」{n}ヴォックス・グリルの下から、シベリアンの裂けた口の角が笑顔に広がるのが見える。{/n}「五百年前に、その連隊は全員で私に忠誠を誓った。そして、その誓いは、私の後継者、取り消すことはできない」
languages.original_text: "I myself did." {n}From beneath the vox-grille, a corner of Seberian's torn mouth becomes visible as it stretches into a smile.{/n} "Five centuries ago, the regiment swore its oath of fealty to me in its entirety, and such an oath, my heir, cannot be undone."

traits.locale_text: 「私もそうでした」{n}ヴォックス・グリルの下から、シベリアンの裂けた口の角が笑顔に広がるのが見える。{/n}「五百年前に、その連隊は全員で私に忠誠を誓った。そして、その誓いは、私の後継者、取り消すことはできない」

languages.text: "Ich selbst." {n}Unter dem Vox-Gitter erkennst du Seberians zu einem Lächeln verzogenen Mundwinkel.{/n} "Vor fünf Jahrhunderten hat das gesamte Regiment einen Treueeid abgelegt, und ein solcher Schwur kann nicht widerrufen werden, {mf|Erbe|Erbin}."
languages.original_text: "I myself." {n}From beneath the vox-grille, a corner of Seberian's torn mouth becomes visible, stretched into a smile.{/n} "Five centuries ago, the regiment swore its oath of fealty to me in its entirety, and such an oath, heir, cannot be undone."
